name: Wam Income Maximiser Limited
analysis: WMX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.6937. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7000, stop A$1.5978, target A$2.0066 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
